ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Kevin McLaughlin, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Vitorgledes Rodrigues Da Luz and Heli Machado Braga, are present with Portuguese Interpreter.
Plaintiffs and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants: Aida E. Hernandez; Henry Hernandez and Juliet Hernandez as follows:
Damages $72,802.42
Prejudgment Interest $10,331.95
Attorney's Fees $7,215.00
Costs $2,878,166 for a total of $93,227.50
Judgment signed in open court.
